block_00: ​​Have a Blast with us this Diwali by joining this exclusive Tournament.
block_02: Wishing this year's Diwali is filled with wisdom and laughter, which may mark the start of a very fortunate year for you and your family. A very Happy & Safe Diwali to all.
block_03: It’s finally time for our traders to come together with their loved ones and have a Blast with our exclusive — Diwali Blast Tournament 2022, that will be taking place on 23 Oct – 04 Nov 2022. Top-15 Traders will share a guaranteed prize pool of $1,500
block_09: Join on 23 October 2022 and compete!
